title: PLUX Developer Team
description: We would like to inform everyone that the Bari Plux Tool update will resume tomorrow, and we will continue working towards a better and more awesome update than ever! We ask all contacts and community members to let us know about the program's problems, suggestions, and expectations so that we can provide the best product. Please share your comments now while there is still time; otherwise, subsequent requests will be deferred to secondary updates.

title: PLUX Help Service
description: Dear user, we are monitoring all the problems of Bari Plux Tool. If you encounter any problem or bug in the program, please inform us through the Contact -> Report section or via our social media apps.

title: BPT v2.2 is now live!
description: We are excited to announce the release of Bari Plux Tool v2.2. This update brings a brand new Settings page, enhanced system specs detection (multi-GPU, exact Windows build, physical resolution), improved cleanup tools, and new optimization features including Virtual Memory, System Services, and GameLoop Priority management.
